title: Live coverage: Semiconductor manufacturing test bed to fly alongside Starlink satellites on Falcon 9 launch
summary: Liftoff of the Starlink 10-50 mission from Space Launch Complex 40 is currently scheduled for 6:46 a.m. EDT (1046 UTC). The rocket's first-stage booster will carry two semiconductor manufacturing pods for Besxar Space Industries.

title: NASA’s Hubble Spies Stellar Sparkler for July 4th
